creator: huntting@glarp.com
text:
The -miltime option for dclock doesnt work as advertised.
	Similarly the "miltime" X resource is also broken.

Fix: Here are the two patches I came up with to fix this:
How-To-Repeat: 	
	TZ="somewhere where it's afternoon"
	dclock -miltime
	dclock -xrm 'Dclock*miltime:true'
	dclock -xrm 'DClock*miltime:true'
